en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Social Security Compliance Certificate in the Spain Social Security Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t

A Social Security compliance certificate is an official certificate issued by the Spanish Social Security Treasury (TGSS) that states whether a person or company is up to date with all Social Security payment obligations.\n\nThe Social Security compliance certificate can be obtained through the Spanish Social Security Treasury website.
Please upload your Social Security compliance certificate issued by the Spanish Social Security Treasury.
